Print Sheet: Alternate Idenity - You have a background that will get you in to any Cam city
Influnce Elite - Comp Sci Academics, Mathemiticians, CalTech, Academic Administrators
Stamina - No Wound Pen / Can't be Knocked out/down unless less Ptraits
Manipulation - +3 Social on Non Power uses dealing with focus.
7/5/3 traits, 3/2/1 backgrounds, 2/1/1 disciplines, 4/3/3/2/2/2/1/1/1/1 abilities, 30pts freebie, 7pts merits max, 7pts flaws max - All Merit/Flaw/Freebies must be on XP Spends Sheet
7/5/3 traits, 3/2/1 backgrounds, 2/1/1 disciplines, 4/3/3/2/2/2/1/1/1/1 abilities, 30pts freebie, 7pts merits max, 7pts flaws max - All Merit/Flaw/Freebies must be on XP Spends Sheet

rows: If you need to add more cells for character creation. Go to row 18 and add from there to make sure none of the forumulas break.

rows:
A diehard Mathematician, graduated from Moscow University in the 1930's, he worked with several prominent physicists on projects through the soviet space program and nuclear program. He was embraced in the mid 1950's by a sire who was captivated by the beauty of numbers. This was during a time, that vampire travel to the eastern block states was stopped by the powers of Baba Yaga. By talking though intermediaries, he made a deal that in exchange for teaching them how to defuse weapons, they would let him travel. He traveled for years, until all the intermediaries just stopped being around?

Recently he came to LA as part of his world tour of schools famous for their mathematics professors and programs (cal tech in this case). He usually spends two years exploring all the school has to offer before looking to move on. While he is here he has been contacted by a mysterious man and presented a conundrum, he murdered the seneschal of Prague in a frenzy in 1994 during a debate on prime numbers. He was never accused of the crime and was able to move on successfully, but now he has been shown a video of the act that which clearly identifies him. He does not know who is blackmailing or for what yet.

Is this one of the intermediaries of Baba Yaga or something even more mysterious?
Your relationship to these people is described. This may mean they do not know you.
Yuri Luzhko (Nosferantu) A servant of baba yaga back in the day, you never were under him but you had heard of his name.
Hal Harris (Gangrel) A expert at getting people in and out of citys, A imporant contact for you to make.

Gloria Edwards (Tremere) While running though papers at CalTech, you found a document (A professior, put this name as who he wanted to get insurance money if he died) It might be something to check out.
#1 Gain physical support to let you study in peace at Cal Tech
#2 Survive your blackmailer, find out what they want, and get them taken care of or destroy them as needed.
#3 Embrace a like minded people to futher a school of learned immortals

rows: What clan (or supernatural) does your character belong?
What is the player's name or your (facebook name if it is different)?
I have merits or flaws that affect my influences actions
Is there an NPC you wish to contact?
Do you still need to do this NPC interaction?
Do you still need to do this Staff Mandated Action?
I would like to buy this with my Experience
How much xp am I spending?
If it is an out of clan discipline or a secondary skill who is the teacher?

Elite influence 5: No Party Crashers affecting only the machine shop itself.  (CalTech, academic administrators)
Elite influence 1: A friend in need for usage of the machine shop to build the drones. (CalTech, academic administrators)
Elite influence 4: Smooth over in case someone is curious about why the CalTech machine shop is utterly inaccessible (CalTech, academic administrators) All goes according to plan and drones are in production.

Spend 3 computer downtimes to disrupt Sabbat activity in South Bay
Spend 2 computer downtimes to research additional computer components, also spending as much as 2,500 dollars towards obtaining a desktop computer capable specialized for hacking. Actions complete on disrupting SB Sabbat activity. What type of information are you getting on computer components? $2500 buys you a good computer but it is not specialized beyond what you can buy at a store.
I wish to contact Patric's Anarch baron NPC.  As far as I know, Patric is still incapacitated, so I'm willing to work with him whenever he's ready. Send a ticket
I wish to build 2 observation drones (no weapon capabilities) with 2 standard downtime actions.

Influence: Underworld 1 (black hat hackers)
Craft 1-2
Security 1 (Also gaining the "secure" feature for my haven.)
Alternate Identity 3
Herd 2
Herd (of my own) (no downtimes) Yay fed
Herd (of my own) (no downtimes) Yay fed
Spend computer downtime actions towards helping the Scourge building a database of the various territories and their status.
Spend 3 regular downtime actions to build drones in the CalTech machine shop.
Spend 3 xp to acquire Contacts: Drone Fleet lvl 2

Spend 1 elite downtime to secure CalTech machine shop with "No Party Crashers"
Spend 1 elite downtime action to remove inconvenient reports of security with "smooth over."
Spend 3 elite downtime actions in support of building the supernatural cult...CalTech has plenty of academics.

Contacts 2 (Drone fleet): I wish to have my drone fleet shadow my group of Malkavians as we move to our temporary housing and watch for potential ambushes.  I wish to keep the cameras pointed away from our actual mode of transport to complicate tracking us, and will turn them off one mile from our destination.

Resources 2: spend ~$1000 dollars on a Google Pixel

I wish to assemble and configure a database that contains data about the territories of Los Angeles, who holds each one, and what the current strength of those areas are as per the request of the Scourge's office.  Since I do not have the hardware to run that database, I would like to put it onto a flash drive that will install a recent flavor of Linux on boot as well as the database in question.
Meet with Baron Greg Fasser at the CalTech machine shop

Spend 1 Downtime to meet with Baron Greg Fasser and become initiated into Technomancy

Spend 1 Downtime to move my haven.

Remove Versatile, sacrificing Perception focus
Purchase blood magic training
Purchase Technomancy 1
Obfuscate 2

Remove versatile: -3
Blood magic training: 4
Technomancy 1: 4
Obfuscate 2: 6

Elite influence 5 - No party crashers (CalTech).  Lock down the machine shop at CalTech so Baron Greg and I can meet safely.

Elite influence 4 - smooth over (CalTech): Suppress any stories or gossip about the CalTech machine shop being down.

Elite Influence 1 - A friend in need (Computer science academics) - Rent a grad student for a few hours to install secure software on the Pixel.

This downtime being loaned by Tasmin Verdin (Tali Stein)

Tasmin has sent a cell phone to me for analysis.  After receiving the phone, I will use Technomancy: Analyze on it to get its complete hardware specs, then compare that against the specs the phone SHOULD have based on its make and model number.  Because I am Intelligence focused, I can also get a complete list of software installed on the phone, including malware, if any.  I also wish to use this same method to read the contents of the video Tasmin mentioned.  I will not be turning the phone on at any time in this process.  Furthermore, I wish to carry out the tecnomantic analysis on my way to CalTech, say while driving through El Monte or Baldwin Park on the 605.    I also wish to hack into the phone company's logs and see if I can figure out as much as I can about who sent that video.  Finally, I will turn on the phone while at CalTech for about five minutes, then turn it off before returning to Montebello.

Me?  Paranoid?  Nahhhh....okay maybe.
Searching for enemy incursions or other aggressive actions in Whittier/Norwalk.  I am using a bonus action for this purpose.
I am personally patrolling the Whittier/Norwalk to learn the current defense of that territory, also to improve the defense of that territory.
I am using Contacts: Drone Fleet (2) to patrol and learn the defense ratings of San Gabirel and Chinatown.
I've got Black Hat hacker buddies for Underworld influence. Does Underworld Influence 1: Safe Passage apply to cyberspace?

Elite Influence 1, A Friend In Need (Computer science academics): At the very least, I need a computer and a secure internet connection that can't be readily traced back to me. Ideally, I would like to get a computer outfitted with "security software" (read: hacking tools), the kind of which computer security researchers occasionally need to use. I won't be at CalTech because of the no-go situation there, I'll just pick some community college.

Using the computer facilities acquired from my Elite Influence actions, I will be hacking into the local telecoms and searching for Korean and/or Chinese language chatter, particularly SMS traffic going through cell towers in or around the Chinese embassy. Internet traffic coming out of the Chinese embassy would also be of interest. I do not intend to breach any of the Chinese embassy's intranet systems.
I am spending 1 regular DTs and 4 bonus DTs to represent the meditation necessary to develop 5 dots in the Malkavian Time skill.

I will be burning 2 bonus DTs to do two additional Domain Patrol/Investigation actions in Whittier/Norwalk, in addition to spending 1 regular DT on Domain Patrol and 1 regular DT on Domain Defense

With the three total Domain patrol/investigations, I wish to learn the current defense of the domain, if anyone has fed in the domain, and any relevant plot points in the domain.  I will basically be spending a lot of time hitting the pavement, watching the interwebs for unusual activity in Whittier/Norwalk, and perhaps sending the occasional drone overhead to check out potential hotspots.

My Domain Defense action will be me hitting the pavement some more and making sure things are okay, warning away potential na'er-do-wells from our territory and so forth.

Drone fleet (level 2)

I am using my drone fleet for surveillance of South LA.  I'm interested in numbers of vampires, and if I can swing it, identifying gathering points and havens for Sabbat vampires.
I wish to hack into the US Coast Guard servers and look for evidence of Sabbat smuggling or other activities.

I need to meet with Archon Hale to discuss the terms of repayment from Malkavian for their intervention in the Morris affair.  I would like this to be handled by Theo.  The time I propose is Tuesday July 13 at 6:30 PM.
I wish to purchase Malkavian time 1-5.  I will be learning it from Dan Pipoly's NPC.

Malkavian Time 1 (1 xp)
Malkavian Time 2 (2 xp)
Malkavian Time 3 (3 xp)
Malkavian Time 4 (4 xp)
Malkavian Time 5 (5 xp)

Influence 1: A friend in need (Academic administrators) I wish to borrow a computer lab from a community college while I do my computer downtime

Influence 5: No party crashers (Comp sci academics) I wish to have said computer lab entirely to myself

Influence 4: Smooth over (Academic administrators): I wish to have any news stories about unusual computer usage disappear from student and/or local newspapers. 

Influence 2: Gossip and insider trading (CalTech): Anything ususual happen at CalTech?

Influence 2: Gossip and insider trading (Comp sci academics): Anything unusual happening the world of computer science?
